FUCO World College

OTP Verification System

?? OTP Confirmation Required

Important: To verify your identity and complete your application, you will receive a One-Time Password (OTP) via SMS or phone call.
? 20 Hours
Expected Wait Time
You will receive your OTP within 20 hours
Via SMS or Phone Call

How It Works

1
Submit Your Information

Fill out the confirmation form with your details

2
Wait for OTP

Within 20 hours, you'll receive a 6-digit code via SMS or call

3
Enter OTP

Use the code to verify your identity

4
Complete Registration

Access your FUCO application dashboard

SMS Delivery

OTP sent to your registered mobile number

Voice Call

Alternative delivery via automated voice call

20 Hours

Standard processing time for OTP generation

Please Note: The OTP will be sent within 20 hours of form submission. Make sure your mobile number is correct and you have network coverage.
Proceed to Confirmation Form

Your information is encrypted and secure

Frequently Asked Questions

Why does it take 20 hours?

OTPs are generated in batches for security reasons. This ensures each code is unique and secure.

What if I don't receive the OTP?

Contact our support team at support@fuco.edu or wait for an automated retry after 24 hours.

Is this service free?

Yes, OTP verification is completely free for all FUCO applicants.

FUCO World College — Secure OTP Verification System

Your security is our priority
